com.irurueta.units

Class AngularAccelerationFormatter

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.irurueta.units.MeasureFormatter<AngularAcceleration,AngularAccelerationUnit>
      • com.irurueta.units.AngularAccelerationFormatter
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Cloneable

    public class AngularAccelerationFormatter
extends MeasureFormatter<AngularAcceleration,AngularAccelerationUnit>
implements Cloneable
    Formats and parses angular acceleration value and unit.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static String DEGREES_PER_SQUARED_SECOND
      Degrees per squared second symbol.
      static String RADIANS_PER_SQUARED_SECOND
      Radians per squared second symbol.

      • clone

        public Object clone()
        Clones this angular acceleration formatter.
        Specified by:
        clone in class MeasureFormatter<AngularAcceleration,AngularAccelerationUnit>

        a copy of this angular acceleration formatter.

      • equals

        public boolean equals(Object obj)
        Determines if two angular acceleration formatters are equal by comparing all of its internal parameters.

        equals in class MeasureFormatter<AngularAcceleration,AngularAccelerationUnit>
        Parameters:

        Returns:
        true if provided object is assumed to be equal to this instance.

      • getUnitSystem

        public UnitSystem getUnitSystem(String source)
        Gets unit system for detected unit into provided string representation of a measurement.
        Specified by:
        getUnitSystem in class MeasureFormatter<AngularAcceleration,AngularAccelerationUnit>
        Parameters:
        source - a measurement string representation to be checked.
        Returns:
        a unit system (metric) or null if unit cannot be determined.

      • parse

        public AngularAcceleration parse(String source)
                          throws ParseException,
                                 UnknownUnitException
        Parses provided string and tries to determine an angular acceleration value and unit.
        Specified by:
        parse in class MeasureFormatter<AngularAcceleration,AngularAccelerationUnit>
        Parameters:
        source - text to be parsed.
        Returns:
        an angular acceleration containing a value and unit.
        Throws:
        ParseException - if provided string cannot be parsed.
        UnknownUnitException - if unit cannot be determined.

      • findUnit

        public AngularAccelerationUnit findUnit(String source)
        Attempts to determine an angular acceleration unit within a measurement string representation.
        Specified by:
        findUnit in class MeasureFormatter<AngularAcceleration,AngularAccelerationUnit>
        Parameters:
        source - an angular acceleration measurement string representation.
        Returns:
        an angular acceleration unit, or null if none can be determined.

      • formatAndConvert

        public String formatAndConvert(Number value,
                               AngularAccelerationUnit unit,
                               UnitSystem system)
        Formats and converts provided angular acceleration value and unit using metric system. This implementation ignored provided unit system.
        Specified by:
        formatAndConvert in class MeasureFormatter<AngularAcceleration,AngularAccelerationUnit>
        Parameters:
        value - a measurment value.
        unit - a measurement unit.
        system - ignored.
        Returns:
        a string representation of angular acceleration value and unit.

      • getUnitSymbol

        public String getUnitSymbol(AngularAccelerationUnit unit)
        Returns unit string representation.
        Specified by:
        getUnitSymbol in class MeasureFormatter<AngularAcceleration,AngularAccelerationUnit>
        Parameters:
        unit - an angular accelerationunit.
        Returns:
        its string representation.
